clusters.notes: Three Cat 7 companies emerged or confirmed in the last 72 hours — SolvaPay (new), Nava (emerged from stealth Apr 14), and Ralio (formal close). European cluster activating (SolvaPay Stockholm + Ralio London). Now the most contested gap in the pipeline with 8 pure-play startups. SolvaPay team (ex-FIS, BoA, Lehman, Handelsbanken) directly answers the Serafis European-equivalent mandate. Visa Intelligent Commerce Connect supports all four protocols (TAP, MPP, AP2, ATXP) simultaneously.

Breakeven September 2025. Positioned as EU's profitable AI guardrails leader under DORA and AI Act. Note: Series B places this past stage sweet spot; upvoted anyway for agentic security angle.

clusters.notes: Astor (YC W26, Monashees-led $5M seed) added 2026-04-27. First Personal Agent in pipeline to combine paying retail customers (~4,000 at $15–$40/mo), Series 65/RIA licensure, and brokerage integration. Architecturally a consumer chatbot today; regulatory surface is exactly what the app store's front-door layer needs. Score 69 reflects consumer-chatbot framing risk — re-rate up if Astor exposes an MCP server or agent-callable API. Founder pedigree strong: Bruno Koba (ex-Nubank/Monashees), Daniel Tulha (ex-Stripe/Robinhood).

Targets non-traditional alt-data slice rather than filings/thesis validation; complementary, not duplicative. All four companies still US-based — European equivalent mandate remains open. 'Agent exposure' preference strengthening (2 of 3 prior notes mention it; Cohesion's framing as 'agentic teammate' is API-leaning and should re-rate up if it exposes an MCP server).

external_signals: Cohesion (S1, YC W26) — agentic teammate for public-equities hedge funds, alt-data tracking

emerging_cross_gap_themes.notes: Validates the alt-sourcing hypothesis floated 2026-04-17: web-search may be exhausted for S2–S9, but accelerator-batch monitoring is productive. Recommendation: schedule a dedicated YC W26 batch sweep against S2–S9 vocabulary before next radar. If a third W26 specialist agent surfaces in the next sweep, this becomes a formal sourcing channel.

emerging_cross_gap_themes.notes: Multi-jurisdiction regulatory convergence now structural: US (SEC/FINRA/NIST), EU (AI Act/DORA/PSD3), UK (FCA PS25/22), Singapore (MAS MindForge). Standards propagation timeline: 12-18 months from publication to procurement mandate. FINRA 2026 Oversight Report is the week's most significant new artefact.

emerging_cross_gap_themes.notes: Most concentrated incumbent activity in pipeline history. Card networks, tier-1 banks, identity platforms, and cloud vendors all operationalising agentic commerce simultaneously. The gap between 'agents can transact' and 'agents are governed while transacting' is the remaining infrastructure opportunity. eToro App Store is the closest real-world implementation of the thesis to date — both validation and timeline-compression signal.
